Euler gives each address up to 256 sub-accounts.

One wallet can separate positions, collateral relationships, and strategies.

For users and agents, each position becomes easier to read, manage, and reason about without mixing everything into one account. https://t.co/RXDRCAw1Sd

Euler turns lending market design into a configurable system.

Each vault can define its underlying asset, accepted collateral, oracle, caps, liquidation parameters, and interest-rate model.

Lending markets shaped around specific assets and risk parameters, not a https://t.co/uOj7BouMM8
